allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(d, list\): mods = next\(\(t for t in d if t.get\('name'\) == 'Mods'\), None\) if mods: for col in mods.get\('columns', []\): print\(col.get\('name'\), col.get\('type'\)\) elif isinstance\(d, dict\): mods = d.get\('Mods', {}\) print\(list\(mods.keys\(\)\)[:10] if mods else 'not found'\) print\(type\(d\)\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for item in data.get\('tree', []\): if 'Mod' in item.get\('path',''\) or item['path'].endswith\('.min.json'\): print\(item['path']\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys for item in json.load\(sys.stdin\): print\(item['name']\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('rows:', len\(d\)\); print\('columns:', list\(d[0].keys\(\)\) if d else 'empty'\)")
